documentation.description: Status generated by radio and injected into MAVLink stream.

record_types.name: Radio_Status

fields.name: Rssi
fields.description:
Local (message sender) received signal strength indication in
device-dependent units/scale. Values: [0-254], UINT8_MAX:
invalid/unknown.

fields.name: Remrssi
fields.description:
Remote (message receiver) signal strength indication in
device-dependent units/scale. Values: [0-254], UINT8_MAX:
invalid/unknown.

fields.name: Txbuf
fields.description:
Units: [%]
Remaining free transmitter buffer space.

fields.name: Noise
fields.description:
Local background noise level. These are device dependent RSSI values
(scale as approx 2x dB on SiK radios). Values: [0-254], UINT8_MAX:
invalid/unknown.

fields.name: Remnoise
fields.description:
Remote background noise level. These are device dependent RSSI
values (scale as approx 2x dB on SiK radios). Values: [0-254],
UINT8_MAX: invalid/unknown.

fields.name: Rxerrors
fields.description: Count of radio packet receive errors (since boot).

fields.name: Fixed
fields.description: Count of error corrected radio packets (since boot).
